name: Research Ideation
description: Guided research ideation: 5W1H brainstorming, gap analysis, approach framing, research question formulation, research brief generation.

nodes.prompt: Ask the researcher what topic they want to explore.
Apply 5W1H framework (What, Who, When, Where, Why, How) to the topic.
Scan Candlekeep library and vectorless for existing coverage. Identify gaps in scholarship.
Present research approaches (textual analysis, comparative study, historical survey, conceptual analysis, reception history) and let researcher choose.
Formulate 3 structured research questions with thesis directions, key sources, and feasibility assessment.
Present research questions to the researcher. They choose one or refine.
Generate research-brief.md with question, thesis direction, approach, key sources, gap addressed, scope, and 5W1H summary.
